productDisplayName: John Miller Men Navy Blue Trousers
description: Style NoteThese formal trousers from john miller will go a long way in making you the most sophisticated-looking man at any gathering. Made from the choicest fabrics, they are perfectly fitted for office wear and any other formal occasion when you want to look your best without any effort. Pair them with a crisp formal shirt and leather shoesProduct DetailsNavy blue striped formal trousers, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, brand name embroidered beside right pocket on the front, two buttoned double welt pockets  at the back, metal zipper and button closure and has extendible hemsMaterial and FitPoly/viscoseMachine or hand wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry low and dry inside out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height:6' and waist:32") is wearing a size 32
